testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_and_ai.py:18: in test_health_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_success

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_and_ai.py:37: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_protected_endpoint_without_token
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_and_ai.py:88: in test_protected_endpoint_without_token assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ai_compile_requires_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_and_ai.py:117: in test_ai_compile_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
